gift: She does not know what gift to buy that feels thoughtful.
She wants a gift that looks expensive but is still affordable.
She needs something pretty enough to photograph and post.
self_care: She wants a low-cost way to unwind after work.
She wants her bedroom to feel like a spa.
She needs a bedtime ritual that feels calming and intentional.
home_ambiance: Her apartment does not feel cozy enough.
She wants her space to smell amazing without much effort.
She wants home decor that also creates a mood.

selling_points: Makes any room feel instantly cozy.
Clean burn and comfortable home atmosphere.
Aesthetic enough to leave out as home decor.
Great for night routines, bath time, and slow evenings.
Giftable, visual, and easy to understand in short video.
hooks: POV: your room finally smells like a spa
This candle changed my whole night routine
The gift that looks way more expensive than it is
Why does my apartment suddenly feel like a luxury hotel
If your room needs a reset, start here

video_templates.structure: Hook -> lighting the candle -> room mood shot -> product close-up -> soft CTA
